title: Amber Home 36cm Natural Wooden Pants Hangers 10pcs, Smooth Wood Skirt Hanger Organizer with Adjustable Anti-Slip Chrome Clips, Space Saving Solid Clothes Hangers Rack for Bottoms Jeans Slacks Trousers
features: 【Premium Design】Set of 10pcs. Dimension: 36cm Length*13cm Height*1.2cm Thickness. Weight: 110g/pc. These solid natural wood clip skirts hangers with flat slim body keep garments organized while making full use of your valuable closet space.

【360° Swivel Hook】Natural wooden pants hangers with polish chrome 360° swivel hook ensure you can hang the slacks or shorts from any direction and fits standard hanging rods with long lasting durability.

【Non Slip & Adjustable Clips】Two pant clips grip clothes with strength, top with small grooves for easy opening and closing; clip has protective padding from unsightly marks; slides easily to fit different widths of clothing. 36cm when clips are stretched out, good for wider clothing; 23cm when pushed in, perfect for smaller sized clothing.

【Versatile Use】These space saving hangers are ideal for hanging skirts, pants, jeans, work trousers, maxis, leggings and shorts. Hang boots, socks, towels and pillow cases, on the multifunctional hangers to declutter closet floors and dresser drawers.
【100% Satisfaction Guarantee】Within 90 days if the products from Amber home has any quality problem, please contact us by clicking "ask seller" on Amazon and then you will receive a 100% money back.
description: Product Description Amber Home 36cm Natural Wooden Pants Hangers 10pcs, Smooth Wood Skirt Hanger Organizer with Adjustable Anti-Slip Chrome Clips, Space Saving Solid Clothes Hangers Rack for Bottoms Jeans Slacks Trousers Amber Home is an industry and trade integration company with more than 14 years’ history specialized in designing and producing clothes hangers. We are located in south of China, famous for large amount of natural resources and other geographical advantages. We are really proud of our high grade products, especially wooden and metal hangers. With the combination of superior materials and exquisite craftsmanship, our hangers feature high-and, magnificent and classy, suitable for home use and fashionable clothing stores. Using our hangers not only a way to maximize your restricted storage space but also can make your closet more coordinating. Besides, innovative designs and good services are also what we focus on. So far we have provided hangers for many famous fashion brands all over the world. High grade solid wood material makes the hanger high sturdy and long durable. Smooth surface by glossy lacquering protects your hand and clothes from abrasing. Flat space-saving body, sturdy construction, suitable for all kinds of pants, slacks, jeans, trousers, skirts, socks etc. · Material: Wood+Metal · Color: Natural · Dimension: Length 36cm * Height 13cm * Thickness 1.2cm · Weight: 110g/pc, the hanger is firm enough to hang clothes within 5kg. · Packaging: 10pcs/set Chrome Swivel Hook The hook rotates 360 degrees enabling users to easily turn the hanger sideways to check out garments without even removing them from the clothing rack. Stable Clips The clips design is a perfect solution to hang garments without worrying about them falling or causing unsightly creases and wrinkles. Smooth Polish Finish Healthy lacquer is used, multiple painting, sanding without burr, professional electrostatic lacquering, more smooth, bright colors.
